name: Honey Apricot Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1 Cut the chicken into 8 pieces. Remove the skin.
2 In a large bowl, combine cumin, ginger, coriander, cinnamon, and pepper. Add the chicken and toss to coat.
3 In a large skillet, melt butter with oil over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken for 10-12 minutes or until browned on all sides. Drain off all but 1 tablespoon of fat.
4 Add onions and garlic, then pour in 1/3 cup of stock and honey, stirring and spooning over the chicken. Arrange half of lemon slices over the chicken and tuck in cinnamon sticks (if using). Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer, basting occasionally for 25-30 minutes until the chicken is no longer pink inside.
5 Transfer the chicken and cinnamon sticks to a warm platter. Discard the lemon.
6 Over high heat, bring the remaining stock to a boil. Blend it with cornstarch in the skillet, whisking into the pan and cooking, stirring constantly for 3 minutes or until smooth and thickened.
7 Add the remaining lemon slices and apricots, heating through. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed. Pour over the chicken.
